title: Slovakian Smoked Lasagna
description: A unique twist on the classic Italian dish, this Slovakian Smoked Lasagna combines the richness of cheese with the savory flavor of smoked meat.

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.notes: a blend of cheddar and mozzarella

instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook the smoked sausage over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the cold butter to the skillet and stir until melted.
Combine the cheese and egg in a bowl and mix well.
Spread a layer of the cheese mixture on the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese layer.
Spread half of the cooked sausage mixture over the noodles.
Repeat the layers: cheese mixture, noodles, and sausage mixture.
Top the final layer of noodles with the remaining cheese mixture.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the lasagna rest for 10 minutes before serving. Garnish with fresh parsley.
